caption: A man wearing a tall, silver, peaked wig, glasses, and headphones sits in a studio setting. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt with tan suspenders and a red and white patterned bow tie. He is positioned behind a professional microphone, and his facial expressions shift slightly as he speaks, moving from a neutral look to a slight smile. Behind him is a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and some clothing items. On-screen logos are visible, including one that reads "THE STALLIO PODCAST" and another that says "GOSS TALK JOY". As the scene progresses, the man remains in a stationary position, with the only movement being the natural gestures and expressions associated with speaking into the microphone.
